title: conformance phase 2.11-flex-attention: ferrotorch-core::flex_attention — 1 items pending
description:
Tracking: phase 2.11-flex-attention of the ferrotorch-core conformance suite (parent issue #759).

**Module(s) covered:** flex_attention.rs
**Item count:** 1 `pub` items.

## Mandate

Each public item below requires CPU + GPU + autograd-where-applicable
conformance test coverage referenced from `ferrotorch-core/tests/conformance_*.rs`.
Until this phase lands its tests, every item here is excluded in
`ferrotorch-core/tests/conformance/_surface_exclusions.toml` with this issue
as its `tracking_issue` field. The strict gate
(`tests/conformance_surface_coverage.rs`) enforces the contract.

## Items pending

- `ferrotorch_core::flex_attention::flex_attention`  (*fn*) — `fn flex_attention < T , F > (query : & Tensor < T > , key : & Tensor < T > , value : & Tensor < T > , score_mod : Opt...`
